title: Fix author field in blog schemas and ensure it is loaded
description: The frontend expects 'name' field in author object, but backend provides 'display_name'. Also ensure author is always loaded in list_posts.
acceptance_criteria: AuthorRead schema in backend/app/api/v1/blog/schemas.py includes 'name' field (can be an alias for 'display_name')
BlogRepository.list_posts in backend/app/api/v1/blog/repository.py continues to use selectinload(BlogPost.author)
Local linting and type checking passes: ruff check, mypy
